---
title: "XGB- Boostrapped Results"
author: "Jason Dude"
format: 
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
boot_results <- readRDS("../../data/interim/xgb_bootstrapped_results.RDS")
```

```{r}
boot_running_ci <- boot_results |>
  arrange(iter) |>
  mutate(B = row_number()) |>
  mutate(
    bal_acc_lo = map_dbl(B, ~ quantile(bal_acc[1:.x], 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
    bal_acc_hi = map_dbl(B, ~ quantile(bal_acc[1:.x], 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)),
    bal_acc_mean = map_dbl(B, ~ mean(bal_acc[1:.x], na.rm = TRUE)),
    auc_lo = map_dbl(B, ~ quantile(auc[1:.x], 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)),
    auc_hi = map_dbl(B, ~ quantile(auc[1:.x], 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)),
    auc_mean = map_dbl(B, ~ mean(auc[1:.x], na.rm = TRUE))
  )

boot_running_ci |>
  select(B, bal_acc_mean, bal_acc_lo, bal_acc_hi) |>
  slice(c(10, 25, 50, 100, 150, 200))

boot_running_ci |>
  ggplot(aes(x = B, y = bal_acc_mean)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = bal_acc_lo, ymax = bal_acc_hi), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrap convergence: Balanced Accuracy",
    x = "Number of bootstrap samples (B)",
    y = "Balanced accuracy (running mean) with 95% percentile CI"
  )

boot_running_ci |>
  ggplot(aes(x = B, y = auc_mean)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = auc_lo, ymax = auc_hi), alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrap convergence: AUC",
    x = "Number of bootstrap samples (B)",
    y = "AUC (running mean) with 95% percentile CI"
  )

boot_running_ci |>
  mutate(
    bal_acc_width = bal_acc_hi - bal_acc_lo,
    auc_width = auc_hi - auc_lo
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = B, y = bal_acc_width)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "CI width convergence: Balanced Accuracy",
    x = "Number of bootstrap samples (B)",
    y = "95% CI width"
  )

boot_running_ci |>
  mutate(auc_width = auc_hi - auc_lo) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = B, y = auc_width)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "CI width convergence: AUC",
    x = "Number of bootstrap samples (B)",
    y = "95% CI width"
  )

boot_summary <- boot_results |>
  summarise(
    bal_acc_mean = mean(bal_acc),
    bal_acc_sd = sd(bal_acc),
    bal_acc_lo = quantile(bal_acc, 0.025),
    bal_acc_hi = quantile(bal_acc, 0.975),
    auc_mean = mean(auc),
    auc_sd = sd(auc)
  ) 
print(boot_summary)

# balanced accuracy distribution
hist(
  boot_results$bal_acc,
  breaks = 15,
  main = "Boostrapped results",
  xlab = "Balanced accuracy"
)
abline(v = median(boot_results$bal_acc), lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(v = boot_summary$bal_acc_mean + 2*(boot_summary$bal_acc_sd), lty = 2, lwd = 1, col = "red")
abline(v = boot_summary$bal_acc_mean - 2*(boot_summary$bal_acc_sd), lty = 2, lwd = 1, col = "red")

# AUC distribution
hist(
  boot_results$auc,
  breaks = 15,
  main = "Boostrapped results",
  xlab = "AUC"
)
abline(v = boot_summary$auc_mean, lty = 2, lwd = 2)
abline(v = min(boot_summary$auc_mean + 2*(boot_summary$auc_sd), 1), lty = 2, lwd = 1, col = "red")
abline(v = boot_summary$auc_mean - 2*(boot_summary$auc_sd), lty = 2, lwd = 1, col = "red")

```
